format: ALEX/JORDAN dialogue, plain text, no stage directions
notes: Episode 4 confirms term begins first Monday in December 2026 (Dec 7), Dem primary June 23. Two Dem candidates: Luedtke + Hidayat (former MoCo cop, three-time prior candidate). Republican waiting in November: Maldonado rematch. Three substantive Dem disagreements: (1) up-county equity in capital plan, (2) policing posture, (3) establishment optics. Sanctuary policy answered plainly — Luedtke yes, Hidayat unknown, none of the Dems running against the framework. Wootton + MCPS grading flagged as Board of Education questions, not Council questions. Closes with five concrete second-term-Luedtke continuities. Decision tree given without endorsement. The framing the listener flagged — promised candidate deep-dives — is honored across the four episodes without being self-narrated as a complaint, per PM avoid_list.
